data.title: Barbie Celebrates International Women’s Day With First-ever Barbie Dream Team of Global Female Role Models
data.description: Mattel, Inc. revealed that in celebration of International Women’s Day, Barbie® is organizing a month-long event. This includes the introduction of the Barbie™ Dream Team, which consists of unique dolls resembling women who have made significant strides in their respective fields. Additionally, there will be exclusive Barbie Dream Days™ content and the launch of Barbie Dream Fest, a multiple-day immersive fan event. Barbie aims to showcase the achievements of inspirational women, emphasizing the importance of representation and access to successful female role models in various industries.
